result.Name: Nebula Cache Manager (no namespace)
result.Description: A scalable & configurable cache management system for Apex developers

result.Name: Nebula Logger - Unlocked Package
result.Description: The most robust observability solution for Salesforce experts. Built 100% natively on the platform, and designed to work seamlessly with Apex, Lightning Components, Flow, Process Builder & integrations.

result.Name: Nebula Logger Plugin - Async Failure Additions
result.Description: Adds support for logging unexpected batch class failures in Apex
result.Alias: Nebula Logger - Core Plugin - Async Failure Additions

result.Name: Nebula Logger Plugin - Big Object Archiving
result.Description: Adds the ability to archive log entry data in the big object LogEntryArchive__b
result.Alias: Nebula Logger - Core Plugin - Big Object Archiving

result.Name: Nebula Logger Plugin - Log Retention Rules
result.Description: Adds the ability to create & deploy advanced, configurable rules for setting the retention date on Log__c records, using custom metadata types LogRetentionRule__mdt and LogRetentionRuleCondition__mdt.
result.Alias: Nebula Logger - Core Plugin - Log Retention Rules

result.Name: Nebula Logger Plugin - Logger Admin Dashboard
result.Description: Includes a new Logger Admin dynamic dashboard, as well as several new reports, to help monitor logs in your org.
result.Alias: Nebula Logger - Core Plugin - Logger Admin Dashboard

result.Name: Nebula Logger Plugin - Slack
result.Description: Automatically post critical logs to your Slack channel.

result.Name: Nebula Query & Search (no namespace)
result.Description: A robust SOQL & SOSL query builder system for Apex developers

result.Name: NEW - Nebula Logger Plugin - OpenTelemetry
result.Description: Automatically sends your Nebula Logger data to OpenTelemetry (OTEL) endpoints

result.Name: zz - Deprecated - Nebula Logger Plugin - Filtered Log Entry Events
result.Description: Create & subscribe to a filtered subset of important LogEntryEvent__e records, using configurable custom metadata types.

result.Description: Automatically sends your Salesforce log data to Splunk.
